name: creatorland-data
description: Creatorland Data MCP + companion skills — creator discovery, brief/transcript-to-shortlist, fair-price negotiation, rate benchmarking for influencer-marketing teams.

interface.shortDescription: Creator discovery, casting shortlists, and fair-rate benchmarking from real brand-creator deal data.
interface.longDescription: One install wires the Creatorland Data MCP connection plus a catalog of agency and brand workflow skills: find creators from a written brief or a call transcript, build client-ready shortlists, benchmark a quoted rate against the deal corpus, screen creators for competitor conflicts, and request creator connections. Honest by construction — every rate is a market band, never a fabricated number.
defaultPrompt: Use Creatorland Data to build a shortlist of beauty creators for a spring campaign.
Use Creatorland Data to benchmark a $5,000 quote for a fitness Reel.
